descriptionShort: Toronto Maple Leafs schedule listing for January through April 1993.
descriptionLong: This newspaper clipping from The Toronto Star contains the Toronto Maple Leafs' game schedule spanning from January through April 1993, listing opponents, dates, times, and game locations. The page also includes a brief injury report on Vancouver Canucks forward Greg Adams, who suffered a severe charley horse and was expected to miss four to six weeks of play.
